The '''LF9 ion engine''' was a type of [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]] manufactured by [[Alderaan Royal Engineers]]. They were the primary engines of the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]. However, the engines were not capable of providing the speeds needed for the vessel to match the velocities of other combat [[Starship/Legends|starships]] or [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].<ref name="SWS" /> Most enemy ships could simply outrun a ''Victory''-class, forcing their [[Captain/Legends|captains]] to use superior positioning during combat.<ref name="EGVV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>
